description: A picture-perfect paradise of white sandy beaches, crystal-clear lagoons, and luxurious overwater villas. The Maldives offers ultimate relaxation with private island resorts, world-class diving, snorkeling among vibrant coral reefs, sunset cruises, and rejuvenating spa experiences. An idyllic escape for couples, honeymooners, and anyone seeking pure tropical bliss.
name: ULTIMATE MALDIVES
